name: Precise Taxes & Credit Repair Service - Jacksonville
description_short: Jacksonville-based tax and credit repair service offering credit consultations with 90-day action plans, tax preparation, and notary services.
description_long:
Precise Taxes & Credit Repair Service operates from a downtown Jacksonville location at 25 North Market Street and markets itself as a combined tax preparation and credit restoration provider. The business is built around a team approach, with named professionals (Shella Oleus, Antwone Williams, and Tiki Alexander) available for booking.

The company's service menu centers on three main offerings: tax preparation (free for W2 and 1099 clients), credit restoration (via a $75 credit consultation with audit and 90-day plan mapping), and notary services ($10 per document). The credit restoration service is positioned specifically for consumers attempting to improve their credit for loan approval purposes. Tax services are differentiated between standard W2 filers and self-employed/1099 earners, with pricing transparency and clear service descriptions.

Precise Taxes distinguishes itself through bundled services—combining tax and credit help under one roof—and transparent, low-cost entry points ($75 consultation vs. higher-tier credit repair firms). They maintain extended hours (9:15 AM to 7:30 PM weekdays, 10:30 AM Saturday, 12 PM Sunday) and offer online booking via Setmore. The business emphasizes accessibility with free tax prep for common scenarios.

However, the company shows limited online credibility markers: only 2 reviews (both positive but from 2 years ago), no independently verified credentials visible, and minimal digital footprint. The website lacks detail on credit repair methodology, disputation processes, regulatory compliance, or outcomes. For a credit repair company, the absence of specificity around Fair Credit Reporting Act practices, dispute timelines, or success metrics is notable.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free tax preparation for W2 and 1099/self-employed filers
Low-cost credit consultation entry point at $75 with documented 90-day action plan
Extended hours including weekend and Sunday availability
Multi-disciplinary team allows same-location tax and credit services
Online booking system via Setmore for convenience
Clear service pricing with no hidden fees advertised
cons: Only 2 customer reviews, both from 2 years ago—insufficient current feedback
No visible credentials, certifications, or regulatory compliance information (NACCC, licensing details)
Credit repair methodology not detailed; no explanation of dispute process or Fair Credit Reporting Act compliance
No information on credit repair success rates, average timeline, or typical outcomes
Limited online presence; website appears basic and lacks detailed service descriptions for credit restoration
best_for: Jacksonville residents seeking bundled tax and credit services at one location
Self-employed/1099 earners needing free tax prep combined with credit review
Consumers preparing for loan applications who want a quick 90-day credit audit and action plan
diagnosis: Precise Taxes is best for Jacksonville residents who need combined tax and credit services with flexible scheduling and low upfront costs. The primary caveat: lack of recent reviews, visible credentials, and transparency about credit repair methodology make it difficult to assess actual effectiveness; consumers should verify licensing and request references before committing to credit repair services.
services: Credit consultation with credit report audit
Tax preparation for W2 income earners (free)
Tax preparation for self-employed and 1099 earners (free)
Business tax write-off and LLC tax prep
Mileage and expense documentation for tax purposes
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 25 N Market St unit 106, Jacksonville, FL 32202
